name: Sacred Mending
descriptionTemplate: Recover [Heal:Arg1] HP and gain [Arg2] {STR}. If Clementine is in your team, add 1 extra instance of the following effects to her next Command Card you play: DMG, Shield, HP Recovery, Aliemus, and Keyflare.
lore:
She has healed countless patients, guiding them toward rebirth, and everything now is just a psychological therapy.
The only special thing is that the patient is herself.
